title: bellium nivale
intro: Bellium nivale, also known as winter snowbell or mountain snowbell, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloids and glycosides. Consuming Bellium nivale may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, while also supporting the digestive system and immune function. Bellium nivale can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
